title: Voyager 1 to reach 1 light-day from Earth on November 18 - EarthSky
summary_full: Voyager 1 to reach 1 light-day from Earth on November 18  EarthSkyVoyager 1 has been travelling non-stop since 1977, faster than a speeding bullet every second of every day, and it has not yet reached the distance of a single light-year from Earth  Space DailyThe 49-Year-Old Spacecraft Still Talking From Deep Space  HackerNoonNASA launched it in 1977, nearly 50 years later, it's still talking to Earth  MSNVoyager 2 is the fastest object humanity has ever launched into deep space, moving at 34,000 miles an hour — faster than a rifle bullet — and yet after nearly 50 years it would still need 75,000 more to reach the nearest star, a paradox that shows why crossing  19FortyFive
